citation: HUD ML 2023-05 Table A row "Term > 15yr, LTV <= 90%, <= $726,200"; HUD ML 2013-04 termination rule
comment: Hand-calc: principal=$400k, original_value=$470k -> LTV=0.85106382... <= 0.90 -> row [term<=360, 0.00<LTV<=0.90, <=$726,200] -> annual_mip_rate=0.0050. UFMIP = $400,000 * 0.0175 = $7,000.00. LTV<=0.90 -> terminates at 132 months (11 years).
